title: Biome Fest
description: A vanilla-like mod adding 14 new biomes without any new blocks or items.
body:
![Text in a minecraft style font saying "BIOME FEST"](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/9104f566e04c4f6c06e1c508ef69f4e85c77a6de.jpeg)
Biome fest is a biome mod that aims to add interesting and unique biomes that fit into minecraft while not adding any new blocks.
I plan on making another version with custom blocks and items for more imaginary biomes.

Below all the biomes are listed:

<details>
<summary>Spoiler</summary>
  
- Amberwood Forest
  - A redish-orange oak forest found in colder climates.
- Ancient Oak Forest
  - A rare forest with giant oak trees reaching up to 78 blocks high.
- Birch Grove
  - A birch forest with tall trees and flowers.
- Birch Shrubland
  - A flat plains like biome with small birch bushes and coarse dirt.
- Blackstone Barrens
  - A desolate biome covered in blackstone, obsidian and lava pools.
- Blasted Highlands
  - A barren biome covered in cobblestone and obsidian, found in mountains and colder areas.
- Deadwood Grove
  - A rare biome filled with dead trees, coarse dirt, and cobwebs.
- Deep Ocean Trench
  - A rare ocean biome with sea pickles and seagrass. Most commonly found around mushroom islands.
- Dry Grassland
  - A dry biome filled with tall grass.
- Flowering Forest
  - Oak trees with azalea leaves and high amounts of various flowers.
- Mosslands
  - A rare biome filled with moss, pools, and azalea trees.
- Overgrown Oak Forest
  - A forest biome filled with dark oak and oak trees, densely packed.
- Sparse Forest
  - Moderate amounts of oak and birch trees.
- Umbrella Forest
  - A rare jungle biome filled with large trees of jungle wood, Extremely dense.

</details>
